prompt: Build an IBM-branded proposal deck with 4 slides using pptxgenjs and Carbon Design System. The deck is for 'Digital Transformation Services'. Slide 1: title. Slide 2: 4 challenge cards in a 2x2 grid with left gradient accent bars and icons. Slide 3: timeline with 3 phase cards and arrow connectors. Slide 4: outcomes with a bottom callout bar.

assertions.text: Output .pptx file exists and is valid
Uses renderVerticalGradientBar for left accent bars
Uses FaArrowRight icons (not LINE shapes) for timeline arrows
Callout bar uses matching tint color from Tint Color Guide
Font sizes are 9pt or larger throughout
